description: Circular sustainability framework infographic centered on the Nestlé logo and “Good food, Good life,” with three large colored segments labeled “PEOPLE, FAMILIES & PETS” (blue), “PEOPLE IN COMMUNITIES” (orange), and “PEOPLE & PLANET” (green). Surrounding outer ring segments are labeled “Improved nutrition,” “Tailored nutrition,” “Affordable nutrition,” “Support for balanced lifestyles,” “Packaging & circularity,” “Climate,” “Water,” “Nature & biodiversity,” “Responsible sourcing,” “Human rights,” “Diversity, equity & inclusion,” and “Youth & partners.” Small illustrations show people, pets, plants, crops, and wind turbines.

Photograph of two suited men standing indoors in front of large windows, looking at and pointing to a black folder or document. Behind them is a bright outdoor landscape with green hills, a modern building, and a Swiss flag on a pole.
Signatures of Paul Bulcke, Chairman, and U. Mark Schneider, Chief Executive Officer.
